summary: Phase 6.2 (Smart Profile Form / Client Eligibility Profiles) — backend + frontend tested end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 PASS in pytest covering CRUD, age auto-compute from DOB, list with pagination + search + status filter, get-detail, PATCH section-level merge (basic_info merge preserves DOB + other sections untouched), duplicate (new id + (Copy) suffix + status=draft + pa_id cleared), link-to-pa/unlink-pa, prefill-from-pa 404, stats/me counts, RBAC (client 403 on list/create/stats, partner can list but cannot delete admin-owned profile → 403), Phase 6.1 KB regression (AU+CA+NZ countries reachable), Phase 4D /api/eligibility/score regression (endpoint accepts schema, may flake at AI provider — skip tolerated). Frontend smoke (admin@leamss): /eligibility/profiles loads with empty state + 4 stat cards + search + status filter; /eligibility/new-assessment wizard renders Step 1/7 with all 4 search modes (Specific/Top 3/Custom/Top 5); Specific mode correctly shows country picker AND keeps Next DISABLED until a country is selected; Custom mode shows 3 country chips AND keeps Next DISABLED with 0 selections; Top 3 mode enables Next immediately; Step 2 Basic Info accepts name + DOB and shows live computed 'Age: 36' for 1990-05-15; Step 3 Profession & Education correctly enforces required-field validation (* on Current Profession + Highest Qualification disables Next). Progress bar, Exit, Save Draft, Previous/Next, and step header (Step X of 7) all wired correctly.

issues: Cosmetic: header shows 'Step 1 of 7' while internal state is 0-indexed (0..6). Consistent and correct, just noting the mapping.

action_items: (LOW) Some background polls returned 403 in browser console during /eligibility/profiles navigation — likely from unrelated dashboards. Not blocking Phase 6.2 but main agent may want to audit which endpoints are being polled on this page.

(OBSERVATION) EligibilityProfileWizard.jsx is ~800+ lines per problem statement — consider splitting per-step into sub-components (BasicStep.jsx, ProfessionalStep.jsx, ReviewStep.jsx etc.) before Phase 6.3 stacks AI analysis logic on top.
(OBSERVATION) Backend autosave behaviour: 30s timer + lastAutoSavedSnapshot ref cannot be feasibly verified in a UI test run — code review only; main agent already noted this.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: eligibility_profiles.py is clean (~475 lines), uses async/await consistently, strips MongoDB _id, serialises datetimes, models well-typed with Pydantic (BasicInfo, Professional, Education, LanguageProficiency, Family, Finances, Preferences, WorkHistoryEntry, AdditionalFactors).

GOOD: Section-level merge in PATCH works as documented — basic_info merge preserved date_of_birth + other fields while updating current_city to Delhi; professional/language sections untouched. Test passes.

GOOD: RBAC consistent — ROLE_VIEWERS gate on all read/write; admins see all profiles; partners see only their own / PA-linked; client role gets 403 on every endpoint (verified for list/create/stats); partner cannot delete admin-owned profile (403).
GOOD: Age auto-compute from DOB (1990-05-15 → 35/36 depending on today's month/day) works both at create-time AND on PATCH when DOB changes.

GOOD: Duplicate endpoint correctly clears pa_id, pa_partner_id, pa_created_by_user_id, pa_number, assessment_id, sets status=draft, suffixes name with '(Copy)', assigns new ELG- id, resets created_by to current user.
GOOD: link-to-pa denormalises pa_partner_id + pa_created_by_user_id + pa_client_name + pa_number — enables fast permission checks without extra joins.
GOOD: prefill-from-pa returns prefill payload WITHOUT saving — frontend can let user review/edit before persisting (better UX than auto-create).
GOOD: List view returns only summary fields (avoids over-fetch) including search_mode for at-a-glance filtering.
GOOD: Phase 6.1 KB endpoints (/api/eligibility/kb/countries) unaffected; Phase 4D /api/eligibility/score schema validation still works (separate router, no path collision).
OBSERVATION: ROLE_VIEWERS hardcoded in module — same pattern as KB router; fine. 'client' role intentionally excluded, matching product intent (clients consume results, not author profiles).

OBSERVATION: prefill endpoint returns only a subset (basic_info partial + preferences + name/email/phone). If PA contains professional/education hints, those could be wired in later for richer prefill.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration105_eligibility_profiles.py (NEW — 23 tests covering all 11 endpoints + RBAC + Phase 6.1/4D regression)

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (list page, wizard step 1 modes, step 2 age auto-compute, step 3 required-field validation, search-mode gating all working)

test_credentials: admin@leamss.com / Admin@123 (CRUD + admin operations); partner@leamss.com / Partner@123 (partner-403 negative); client@leamss.com / Client@123 (client-403 negative)
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_-prefixed profiles during pytest run (TEST_Phase62_Profile, TEST_Phase62_Min, and a duplicate copy). All cleaned up at end of test class via DELETE → verified 404 on subsequent GET. The UI test attempted to create TEST_UI_Profile_105 but stopped at Step 3 due to required-field validation — no UI-created profile persisted. client_eligibility_profiles collection is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6.2 backend at /app/backend/routers/eligibility_profiles.py (475 lines) — 11 endpoints under /api/eligibility/profiles. Tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration105_eligibility_profiles.py — reuse as regression for Phase 6.3 (AI Analysis Engine) which will consume these profiles. KEY CONTRACT: section-level merge preserves untouched SECTION keys but REPLACES nested dicts entirely (e.g. PATCH with language.scores={overall:8} overwrites all scores — that's intentional per the main agent's note). Age auto-computed from DOB on both POST and PATCH. Duplicate clears pa_id + assessment_id + sets status=draft. Login returns {token, user} not {access_token} — token key is 'token'. Wizard data-testids are exhaustive (mode-{specific|top_3|custom|top_5}, specific-mode-picker, custom-toggle-{COUNTRY_CODE}, basic-name, basic-dob, basic-email, prof-profession, step-prev, step-next, submit-analyse, progress-dot-{i}, eligibility-wizard, wizard-save-now, wizard-back-page). Step 1 (Profession & Education) has REQUIRED fields — Current Profession (prof-profession) + Highest Qualification (select) must be filled before Next enables. RBAC client=403 on all profile endpoints; partner can list/create own but cannot delete admin-owned (403).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in Phase 6.2. All 11 endpoints, RBAC matrix, age auto-compute, section-level merge, duplicate semantics, PA link/unlink, and prefill all behave per spec. UI smoke validates wizard navigation, search-mode gating, required-field validation, and age display. Two minor non-blocking observations only: (a) some background 403 polls on /eligibility/profiles page (likely unrelated dashboards), (b) EligibilityProfileWizard.jsx is large (~800 lines) — recommend splitting per-step before Phase 6.3 lands.
